message:
feat(abi,membrane): continue startup ABI expansion and runtime math evidence collection

- abi/startup_abi.rs: further refinements to startup ABI contracts
  from concurrent agent work
- abi/startup_abi_contract_test.rs: additional contract test coverage
- membrane/runtime_math/evidence.rs: updates to runtime math evidence
  collection module for structured proof emission

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
